response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical leadership, and a proven track record in scalable systems and open-source contributions, but lacks explicit evidence of building experimentation platforms, feature-flagging systems, or AI-driven growth systems at enterprise scale — key requirements for the role.
strengths: Extensive experience building scalable, distributed systems across multiple tech stacks (Node.js, DLang, TypeScript)
Proven technical leadership with open-source projects and mentorship through workshops and CI/CD infrastructure
Strong data and telemetry exposure via real-time analytics systems and GIS data platforms
concerns: No clear evidence of designing or shipping experimentation frameworks, feature flighting, or guardrail systems
Limited visibility into statistical analysis, bias detection, or AI-powered growth systems despite AI-agent work at Stripe
Role requires 8+ years in experimentation platforms — his resume implies 4-5 years of relevant exposure at best
